zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Ruthven於大約1400年出生在英國蘇格蘭培爾時，她的父親William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven42歲，母親Isabelle Larington32歲。她於1415年與Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安斯托比爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1475年在英國蘇格蘭米德洛迪安享年77歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Ruthven于大约1400年出生在英国苏格兰培爾时，她的父亲William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven42岁，母亲Isabelle Larington32岁。她于1415年与Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安斯托比爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1475年在英国苏格兰米德洛迪安享年77岁。

nameMeanings.name: Ruthven
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name, traditionally pronounced ‘Ri-ven’, from Ruthven by Huntingtower (Perthshire); also possibly from Ruthven (Angus) and various other places of that name throughout Scotland, named either with Gaelic ruadh ‘red’ + mhaighin ‘place’ or with a cognate of Welsh rhudd faen ‘red stone’. The oldest family of this name, the lords of the barony of Ruthven by Perth, were descended from Thor, son of Swain, lord of Tranent in Lothian and first sheriff of Edinburgh on record in the mid 12th century. The family eventually gained the title of Earl of Gowrie, but because of what became known as ‘the Gowrie Conspiracy’ the title was forfeited and from 1600 to 1641 the surname itself was proscribed. The title was later restored to the family, and the present Earl of Gowrie bears the surname Ruthven.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Ruthven was born about 1400, in Perthshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, was 42 and her mother, Isabelle Larington, was 32. She married Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall in 1415, in Stobhill, Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1475, in Midlothian, Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 77.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Ruthven est née environ 1400, à Perthshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Isabelle Larington, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall en 1415, à Stobhill, Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1475, à Midlothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 77 ans.

Sie hat 1415 in Stobhill, Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1475 im Alter von 77 Jahren in Midlothian, Schottland, United Kingdom.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Ruthven(이)가 대략 1400년 영국 스코틀랜드 퍼스실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven(은)는 42세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle Larington(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1415년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언 스토브힐에서 Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1475년 영국 스코틀랜드 미들로스이언에서 77세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Ruthven родилась около 1400 г. в местности пиртшир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени William Ruthven Laird of Ruthven было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Isabelle Larington, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Walter Drummond of Cargill and Stobhall в 1415 г. в местности стобхилл, мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1475 г. в местности мидлотян, Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 77 лет.
